Class Hero

java.lang.Object
Assets.Hero
public class Hero extends Object
Represents the player-controlled hero character in the game. The hero can move, place bombs, take damage, and collect points.

  • Constructor Details

    • Hero

      public Hero(String name)

  • Method Details

    • Move

      public void Move(char input, Map map, ArrayList<Enemy> enemies, ArrayList<Snake> snakes)
      Moves the hero according to player input.

      The hero can move up, down, left, or right if the destination cell is walkable. The hero can also place bombs on their current position using the 'f' key.

      Parameters:
      input - The player's input character ('w', 'a', 's', 'd', or 'f').
      map - The game map that defines valid movement and object positions.
      enemies - A list of all active enemies in the current level.
      snakes - A list of all active snake enemies in the current level.

    • PlaceBomb

      public void PlaceBomb(Map map, ArrayList<Enemy> enemies, ArrayList<Snake> snakes)
      Places a bomb at the hero’s current position, if none exists already.

      Bombs are visualized as 'B' on the map and automatically trigger an explosion countdown that can affect enemies or the hero.

      Parameters:
      map - The map where the bomb will be placed.
      enemies - The list of enemies affected by the bomb.
      snakes - The list of snakes affected by the bomb.

    • TakeDamage

      public void TakeDamage()
      TakeDamage Method: reduces the hero's lives by 1

    • Die

      public void Die()
      Die Method: sets isAlive to false and ends the game
